content.speakerText: Hi, I'm Jamie, the new designer. Do you know where I can find the printer?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，我是新来的设计师Jamie，你知道打印机在哪里吗？
expectedAnswers: Hi Jamie! It's right across from the break room.
Welcome! The printer is on the second floor, near the elevators.
Oh, sure! I can walk you there if you'd like.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确回答了位置问题并表达了欢迎
语言准确性：使用了正确的方位介词和句型
表达自然度：语气友好，符合职场新人互动习惯
关键词覆盖：包含 welcome, printer, show, help 等场景词

content.speakerText: Good morning! I just joined the team. Could you give me a quick overview of how things work here?
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好！我刚加入团队，你能简单介绍一下这里的工作流程吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course! Let me walk you through the basics.
Absolutely—I'd be happy to help you get up to speed.
Sure! We usually start with morning stand-ups and use Slack for updates.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了对方寻求指导的需求
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了恰当的礼貌表达
表达自然度：使用了自然的职场口语，如 'get up to speed', 'walk you through'
关键词覆盖：包含 overview, help, team, work, basics 等核心词

content.scenarioHint: 新员工在办公室遇到一位同事，想礼貌地打招呼并请求一点帮助以尽快熟悉工作流程
content.speakerText: Hi there, I'm new here and was wondering if you could spare a minute to point me in the right direction?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，我是新来的，不知道你能不能抽出一分钟帮我指个方向？
expectedAnswers: Of course! Welcome aboard. What do you need help with?
Absolutely! I'd be happy to help you get settled.
Sure thing! Just let me know what you're looking for.
Definitely! I was new here not long ago — ask me anything.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达了问候和求助意图
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，是否使用了礼貌表达
表达自然度：语气是否符合职场新人的得体沟通风格
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'new', 'help', 'point me in the right direction' 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 新员工在茶水间遇到一位同事，想用轻松但礼貌的方式请求对方介绍公司基本流程
content.speakerText: Hey, I just started this week — any chance you could give me a quick rundown on how things work around here?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，我这周刚入职，你能不能简单给我讲讲这儿的工作流程？
expectedAnswers: Sure! I can walk you through the basics after coffee.
Of course! Let me share what I’ve learned so far.
Definitely — I was in your shoes last month. What do you want to know first?
Absolutely! I’ve got a quick guide I can send you too.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达请求信息的意图且语气友好
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的口语表达如 'rundown', 'around here'
表达自然度：是否符合非正式但专业的职场对话习惯
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'new', 'work', 'rundown', 'around here' 等场景关键词
